coin_profile.name: Quant

dilution_control.label: Dilution Control
dilution_control.chart_ref: Network Economics → Token Supply: Issuance vs Burns

chart_zones.mos_note: Margin of safety present — price near or below speculative fair value during accumulation (bear market) phase.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

meta.data_note: No protocol fee or TVL data found for this token on DeFiLlama. Charts 1 and 2 are unavailable. Charts 3 and 4 show current-year supply and dilution data from CoinGecko.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 5.2/10 and survivability 63.3%. Base: 7.0% p.a., Bull: 13.0% p.a., Bear: -21.1% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. Protocol Fee DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. Fee/MC Multiple compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. Holder Revenue uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. Network Activity (NVT) treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. Rank Benchmark anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. Dilution Adjustment penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods producing values outside 0.03x–15x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.

bull_points: Quant maintains a top-64 market cap position with established liquidity
Long-term adoption thesis remains intact for Cash-Flow Protocol assets
Broader crypto market development continues to benefit established protocols
bear_points: No historical fee data available on DeFiLlama — protocol may be too new or too small to have an established economic track record
